name: Kafka Monitor
description: Monitor a Kafka topic for new messages and trigger jobs when messages are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new messages are detected on the monitored Kafka topic

outputs.description: Passes message information (topic, partition, offset, key, value, timestamp) to triggered jobs via run_config

bootstrap_servers.label: Bootstrap Servers
bootstrap_servers.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka broker addresses

topic.label: Topic
topic.description: Name of the Kafka topic to monitor

group_id.label: Consumer Group ID
group_id.description: Kafka consumer group ID for this sensor

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are detected

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to consume per sensor evaluation

poll_timeout_seconds.label: Poll Timeout (seconds)
poll_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for messages during each poll call before moving on

sasl_mechanism.label: SASL Mechanism
sasl_mechanism.description: SASL mechanism when using SASL_PLAINTEXT or SASL_SSL (e.g., PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256)

sasl_username_env_var.label: SASL Username Env Var
sasl_username_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SASL username

sasl_password_env_var.label: SASL Password Env Var
sasl_password_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SASL password

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
